import random
import time

class Lift:
    def __init__(self, id):
        self.id = id
        self.current_floor = 0
        self.passengers = 0

    def move_to_floor(self, floor):
        print(f"Lift {self.id} moving from floor {self.current_floor} to floor {floor}")
        self.current_floor = floor

    def pick_up_passengers(self, num_passengers):
        self.passengers += num_passengers
        print(f"Lift {self.id} picked up {num_passengers} passengers. Total now: {self.passengers}")

    def drop_off_passengers(self, num_passengers):
        self.passengers -= num_passengers
        print(f"Lift {self.id} dropped off {num_passengers} passengers. Total now: {self.passengers}")

class Building:
    def __init__(self, num_floors, num_lifts):
        self.num_floors = num_floors
        self.lifts = [Lift(i) for i in range(num_lifts)]

    def simulate_hour(self, hour, crowd_size):
        print(f"\nSimulating hour: {hour} with crowd size: {crowd_size}")
        for _ in range(crowd_size):
            floor = random.randint(0, self.num_floors - 1)
            lift = random.choice(self.lifts)
            lift.move_to_floor(floor)
            num_passengers = random.randint(1, 5)
            lift.pick_up_passengers(num_passengers)
            drop_off_floor = random.randint(0, self.num_floors - 1)
            lift.move_to_floor(drop_off_floor)
            lift.drop_off_passengers(num_passengers)

def run_simulation(num_floors, num_lifts, crowd_sizes):
    building = Building(num_floors, num_lifts)
    for hour, crowd_size in enumerate(crowd_sizes):
        building.simulate_hour(hour, crowd_size)
        time.sleep(1)  # Simulate time passing

if __name__ == "__main__":
    num_floors = 10
    num_lifts = 3
    crowd_sizes = [20, 50, 10, 5, 0]  # Morning, lunch, afternoon, evening, night
    run_simulation(num_floors, num_lifts, crowd_sizes)

class Skyscraper:
    def __init__(self, floors, elevators):
        self.floors = floors
        self.elevators = elevators
        self.requests = []

    def request_elevator(self, start_floor, end_floor):
        self.requests.append((start_floor, end_floor))

    def simulate(self, time_of_day):
        elevator_positions = [0] * self.elevators
        elevator_busy = [False] * self.elevators
        results = []

        for request in self.requests:
            start_floor, end_floor = request
            elevator_index = self.find_nearest_elevator(elevator_positions, start_floor, elevator_busy)
            if elevator_index is not None:
                elevator_busy[elevator_index] = True
                results.append((elevator_index, start_floor, end_floor))
                elevator_positions[elevator_index] = end_floor
                elevator_busy[elevator_index] = False

        return results

    def find_nearest_elevator(self, elevator_positions, start_floor, elevator_busy):
        nearest_index = None
        nearest_distance = float('inf')

        for i, position in enumerate(elevator_positions):
            if not elevator_busy[i]:
                distance = abs(position - start_floor)
                if distance < nearest_distance:
                    nearest_distance = distance
                    nearest_index = i

        return nearest_index
